text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Okay, I placed! Guess I should feel relieved?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But, no—I can't let myself be satisfied with this.
Ugh, I wanted to win!
choice_data_list: You looked like you were having a great time.
You looked like you were having a great time.
So you'll win next time, right?
So you'll win next time, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But, no—I can't let myself be satisfied with this.
Ugh, I wanted to win!
choice_data_list: You looked like you were having a great time.
You looked like you were having a great time.
So you'll win next time, right?
So you'll win next time, right?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Of course I was—I was running!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Wait... Scratch that. Have I started sounding kind
of stupid lately?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Given the question I asked, I'm not sure
that's a compliment.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Let me do it over. Next time, I'll finish first and
say something more "me"!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You're trying to stir me up? I'm not riding that
wave.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But sulking is for losers, so fine, I'll say what you
want to hear.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Next time, I'm finishing first. So you better help
me run my best!
